connectors.name: Local files
connectors.tagline: Read, write and organise files in a folder you choose.
connectors.detail: The model can list, read, search, create and edit files — but only inside the folder you pick when adding it. The classic agent connector: summarise documents, tidy a downloads folder, draft files in place.
connectors.permissionsNote: Scoped to the folder you choose. File writes and deletes always ask first.

connectors.name: Memory
connectors.tagline: Let the model remember facts across chats.
connectors.detail: A local knowledge graph the model can add to and search: people, preferences, project facts. Pairs with saved chats — the model can recall what you told it last week. Stored as a plain file in PowerStation's data folder.
connectors.permissionsNote: Everything it remembers stays in a local file on this machine.

connectors.name: Web reading
connectors.tagline: Fetch web pages and articles as clean text.
connectors.detail: Give the model a URL and it can read the page — articles, docs, release notes — converted to markdown so small context windows aren't wasted on HTML noise.
connectors.permissionsNote: Fetches only the URLs the model asks for; each fetch can be gated behind a permission prompt.

connectors.name: Web search
connectors.tagline: Search the web with DuckDuckGo — no API key needed.
connectors.detail: Lets the model look things up: current facts, docs, news. Uses DuckDuckGo, so there is nothing to sign up for. Combine with Web reading so the model can search, then read the best result.
connectors.permissionsNote: Search queries go to DuckDuckGo. Nothing else leaves the machine.

connectors.name: Sequential thinking
connectors.tagline: A scratchpad tool that helps small models reason step by step.
connectors.detail: Gives the model a structured place to think through hard problems one step at a time, revising as it goes. Measurably helps smaller models on planning and multi-step tasks.
connectors.permissionsNote: Pure reasoning aid — no access to files or the network.

connectors.name: Kitchen sink (demo)
connectors.tagline: A test server with 13 sample tools — for trying out the harness.
connectors.detail: The MCP reference test server: echo, adding numbers, sample images and more. Nothing useful for real work, but perfect for watching permission prompts and tool calls in action before you connect anything real.
connectors.permissionsNote: Harmless demo tools; nothing touches your files or network.
